mapper.select: SELECT U.id , U.username , U.email , U.password , U.status , GROUP_CONCAT(R.role_code) AS roleCodes FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_role UR ON U.id = UR.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_roles R ON UR.role_id = R.id WHERE U.username=#{username} GROUP BY U.id , U.username , U.email , U.password , U.status
